channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: xAI Adds 16 New Gas Turbines at Mississippi Facility Despite Ongoing Lawsuit
item.description: Emails show that Elon Musk's company is expanding its use of portable gas-fired power at its Colossus 2 site as a fight over air quality continues.

item.title: ‘Your Wi-Fi cable could be a secret microphone': How researchers turned an earthquake detection method into an accidental spy tool using AI
item.description: With minimal cable access, commercially available tools and AI, attackers can technically listen in to your conversations via your fiber optic cables.

item.title: Sam Altman was winning on the stand, but it might not be enough
item.description: After two weeks of hearing from assorted witnesses that he was a lying snake, the jury finally heard from the lying snake himself: Sam Altman. At the end of the testimony, his lawyer William Savitt asked him how it felt to be accused of stealing a charity. "We created, through a ton of hard work, […]

item.title: Every UAP video released by the U.S. Department of War in 14 minutes
item.description: Watch newly released UAP videos shared by the U.S. Department of War and ODNI as part of a broader records review effort.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Wednesday, May 13 (game #1570)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Wednesday, May 13 (game #1067)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Wednesday, May 13 (game #801)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: The Unitree GD01 Is a Giant Mecha Robot You Can Actually Buy
item.description: China’s Unitree, famous for making low-cost dancing robots, will now sell you a giant, wall-smashing mecha.

item.title: iRacing is now on Vision Pro, but you'll need a hefty PC to play it
Sandisk feels generous, open sources key tech that will supercharge any SSD — great news for AI, but not for your gaming PC
item.description: Sandisk open sources SPRandom, reducing SSD pre-conditioning time from days to hours depending on drive capacity and deployment requirements.

item.title: Meta is facing another lawsuit over scam ads on Facebook and Instagram
item.description: The lawsuit claims Meta is not doing enough to protect senior citizens and other vulnerable groups.
